n_init should be > 0rf
max_iter should be > 0r.
z#n_samples.* should be >= n_clustersr,
zIThe shape of the initial centers .* does not match the number of clustersc
zUThe shape of the initial centers .* does not match the number of features of the datac
wrongzJinit should be either 'k-means\+\+', 'random', an array-like or a callablec
raises

paramrl

z+Algorithm must be either 'lloyd' or 'elkan'c

z!reassignment_ratio should be >= 0c
